turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan, mujhe mere reports chahiye. Lipid profile test kiya tha last Friday.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Aapka naam aur patient ID please?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Shukriya Aarav ji. Main samajhta hoon aap report ke liye wait kar rahe hain, lekin mujhe afsos hai — lab report status check karna mere system mein possible nahi hai is line se.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Toh kaise pata chalega? Online portal hai koi?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Portal ke baare mein main confirm nahi kar sakta abhi. Yeh jaankari aur report dono ke liye humara lab department directly help kar sakta hai. Main aapko abhi unse connect karta hoon.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Please hold karo — let me connect you to our staff who can assist with this.
